content: I am closing out on the accepted no-ship outcome. Final branch state is still clean and synced (`run/oracle/Quinn...origin/run/oracle/Quinn`), with only untracked browser screenshot artifacts left locally. I do not have a credible last-step path to wire browser clipboard handling, clear the remaining acceptance checklist, and honestly open a validated Quinn-to-main PR in the remaining time, so I am not escalating a PR that has not met the required bar.
Final round check: there are still no open pull requests, so no `run/oracle/Quinn` to `run/oracle/main` integration PR was available for legal review during my watch.
Checked the queue and found no open PRs, including no `run/oracle/Quinn -> run/oracle/main` integration PR for accessibility review. I remain on standby.
